markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and optimize the Biologica content pipeline, addressing issues and streamlining processes.](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current pipeline is functioning better than initially thought; most issues are minor and fixable](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Plan to simplify pipeline by converting older workflows to agents and removing redundant steps](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Knowledge base functionality is limited but workable; focus on using specific document queries](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Moving the "add medical source links" step to the end of the pipeline should resolve link issues](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Performance Assessment

  - [Pipeline performing better than expected, despite detailed documentation of issues](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Most problems are minor and fixable; output quality is generally good](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Biologica pipeline outperforming Digital pipeline in terms of content quality](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Knowledge Base Functionality

  - [Current knowledge base not ready for consistent, high-quality answers](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Researcher component working adequately with knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Main issue: inability to query specific documents from knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Workaround: Use ingredient checker as a separate step, outputting as an artifact](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Pipeline Optimization Strategies

  - [Convert older workflows to agents where possible (e.g., medical expert review)](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Remove redundant steps (e.g., first "add medical source links" step)](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Simplify and consolidate steps (e.g., combine Biologica conventions and product dossier validation)](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Move "add medical source links" step to end of pipeline to prevent link removal in later steps](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Adjust research instructions in assignment direction for more focused queries](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Writing Guidelines and Rules

  - [Split writing guidelines into three components: article directions, writing rules, and proofreader checks](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [Writing rules now handled by an agent, working well for hyperlink optimization and trademark symbols](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Remove writing guidelines validation from proofreader checklist, as it's redundant and lacks context](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

### Proofreader and Post-Processing

  - [Separated sentence structure optimization into its own step, improving readability](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Proofreader checklist simplified, focusing on specific checks rather than broad guideline compliance](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
  - [Post-processing agent approach more effective than previous workflows for most tasks](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Run two additional topics (calcium and a previously successful one like Rainfog) through current pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Create new pipeline version incorporating discussed changes and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
  - [Test new pipeline with same three topics and compare outputs](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Kirk to create initial draft of new agentic pipeline based on meeting discussion](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Team to review and refine new pipeline draft once received](https://fathom.video/share/P6NerP3zkDCdRbA25sKKPCQ6dutnqF1R?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
